test_plan.acceptance_criterion: 乘法功能验收：整数、负数、小数乘法计算结果准确，例如输入2*3*4返回24、-2.5*4返回-10，符合预设精度要求
除法功能验收：除法计算结果准确，例如输入10/2返回5、10/3的小数位数与现有运算精度一致，输入除数为0时弹出友好提示「除数不能为0」，程序正常运行不崩溃
历史持久化验收：每次计算完成后自动生成历史记录，关闭应用再重启后历史记录完整无丢失，支持查看所有历史的表达式、结果、计算时间
可测试性验收：mul、div模块对外提供独立可调用的接口，单元测试覆盖率不低于90%，可通过接口直接传入参数验证运算逻辑正确性
兼容性验收：原有加法、减法运算功能完全正常，无回归问题，新增功能交互风格与原有产品完全统一
历史管理验收：支持用户一键清空所有历史记录，清空后重启应用无残留历史数据，操作流畅无卡顿

test_files.content:
import pytest
from core import operations
from core.calculator import Calculator



def test_mul_basic():
    from core.operations import mul
    assert mul(2, 3) == 6
    assert mul(-2.5, 4) == -10
    assert mul(1.5, 2.5) == 3.75

import pytest
from core import operations
from core.calculator import Calculator



def test_div_basic():
    from core.operations import div
    assert div(10, 2) == 5 or abs(div(10,2)-5) < 1e-9
    assert abs(div(10, 3) - 3.3333333333333335) < 1e-9
    assert div(10, 0) == "除数不能为0"

import pytest
from core import operations
from core.calculator import Calculator



def test_history_persistence(tmp_path):
    # workspace will be prepared by TestingWorkflow; use Calculator API to test persistence
    from core.calculator import Calculator
    calc = Calculator()
    calc.clear_history()
    calc.compute('add', 1, 2)
    h = calc.get_history()
    assert isinstance(h, list) and len(h) >= 1
    calc.clear_history()
    assert calc.get_history() == []

import pytest
from core import operations
from core.calculator import Calculator



def test_history_persistence(tmp_path):
    # workspace will be prepared by TestingWorkflow; use Calculator API to test persistence
    from core.calculator import Calculator
    calc = Calculator()
    calc.clear_history()
    calc.compute('add', 1, 2)
    h = calc.get_history()
    assert isinstance(h, list) and len(h) >= 1
    calc.clear_history()
    assert calc.get_history() == []
